entries.title: AI product launch carousel pattern
rules: Lead with the actual product, model, or API name.
Explain what changed before explaining why it matters.
Anchor credibility with dates, model names, pricing, availability, benchmarks, regions, or partners when the source provides them.
angles: what changes for developers or users
what the launch makes easier, faster, cheaper, or more accessible
what limitation or rollout detail readers should watch next
patterns: {entity} is not just announcing a feature; it is changing how people use {topic}.
The next signal to watch is whether this moves from announcement to daily usage.

entries.title: AI business and market signal pattern
rules: Make the business move concrete: who is involved, what changed, and why now.
Tie funding, partnerships, or revenue to product direction or competitive pressure.
Avoid hype words unless the article gives evidence.
angles: what this says about AI demand
what customers or developers may see next
patterns: This matters because money and distribution often decide which AI tools survive.
The bigger signal is where companies are putting real budget, not just attention.
Watch whether this turns into product access, pricing changes, or customer adoption.

entries.title: AI research and model capability pattern
rules: Separate proven capability from claimed capability.
Name the benchmark, model, dataset, or method when available.
Explain the user-facing meaning of the technical result.
angles: whether the result is research-only or product-ready
patterns: The important part is not the label; it is what the model can now handle more reliably.
For users, the question is whether this capability appears in real products.
The catch to watch is whether benchmarks translate into everyday performance.

entries.title: AI regulation and safety pattern
rules: State the rule, complaint, restriction, or risk plainly.
Explain who is affected: users, companies, developers, creators, or governments.
Do not turn legal uncertainty into certainty.
angles: which companies or users are affected
what enforcement or court signal comes next
patterns: This matters because AI adoption now depends on trust, rules, and distribution.
The practical impact is about what companies can safely build or ship.
Watch for enforcement, appeals, policy updates, or product changes.

entries.title: Instagram editorial quality guardrails
rules: Every slide must contain one real idea, not filler.
Use short paragraphs and active verbs.
Remove decorative symbols, cookie text, newsletter footer text, and generic labels.
Do not use phrases like primary entities, likely themes, game changer, revolutionary, this article discusses, or read more.
angles: why a reader should care in one sentence
what to watch after the announcement
patterns: Here is the part that matters.
The practical impact is bigger than the headline.
Save this if you track AI product moves.
